allow: Bash(gleam --version 2>/dev/null || echo "gleam not found in PATH")

Bash(file Switch.mpk 2>/dev/null || echo "file command not available"; python -c "import zipfile; z=zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); print\('\\n'.join\(z.namelist\(\)\)\)" 2>/dev/null || powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('Switch.mpk'\).Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }")

Bash(ls -la Switch.mpk 2>/dev/null && python3 -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); z.printdir\(\)" 2>/dev/null || python -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); z.printdir\(\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); print\(z.read\('Switch.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || python -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); print\(z.read\('Switch.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); print\(z.read\('package.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)" 2>/dev/null || python -c "import zipfile; z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\); print\(z.read\('package.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(node -e "const { readFileSync } = require\('fs'\); const zlib = require\('zlib'\); const buf = readFileSync\('Switch.mpk'\); console.log\('First 4 bytes:', buf.slice\(0, 4\).toString\('hex'\)\); console.log\('ZIP signature:', buf[0] === 0x50 && buf[1] === 0x4B ? 'YES' : 'NO'\)")

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var ZIP_SIG=0x04034b50;var fs=require\("fs"\);var zlib=require\("zlib"\);var b=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var o=0;while\(o<b.length\){var sig=b.readUInt32LE\(o\);if\(sig-ZIP_SIG\)break;var c=b.readUInt16LE\(o+8\);var s=b.readUInt32LE\(o+18\);var f=b.readUInt16LE\(o+26\);var e=b.readUInt16LE\(o+28\);var n=b.toString\("utf-8",o+30,o+30+f\);var d=o+30+f+e;if\(n=="Switch.xml"\){if\(c==8\){console.log\(zlib.inflateRawSync\(b.slice\(d,d+s\)\).toString\(\)\)}else{console.log\(b.toString\("utf-8",d,d+s\)\)}break}o=d+s}')

Bash(python3 -c "
import zipfile
z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\)
for name in z.namelist\(\):
    if name.endswith\('.xml'\):
        print\('=== ' + name + ' ==='\)
        print\(z.read\(name\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
" 2>/dev/null || python -c "
import zipfile
z = zipfile.ZipFile\('Switch.mpk'\)
for name in z.namelist\(\):
    if name.endswith\('.xml'\):
        print\('=== ' + name + ' ==='\)
        print\(z.read\(name\).decode\('utf-8'\)\)
")

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var fs=require\("fs"\);var zlib=require\("zlib"\);var buf=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var ZIP_LOCAL=67324752;var off=0;while\(off<buf.length\){var sig=buf.readUInt32LE\(off\);if\(sig!=ZIP_LOCAL\){break}var method=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+8\);var csize=buf.readUInt32LE\(off+18\);var fnlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+26\);var exlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+28\);var name=buf.toString\("utf8",off+30,off+30+fnlen\);var doff=off+30+fnlen+exlen;if\(name.endsWith\(".xml"\)\){console.log\("FILE:",name,"method:",method,"csize:",csize\);if\(method==8\){var data=zlib.inflateRawSync\(buf.slice\(doff,doff+csize\)\);console.log\(data.toString\(\).substring\(0,200\)\)}else{console.log\(buf.toString\("utf8",doff,doff+csize\).substring\(0,200\)\)}}off=doff+csize}')

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var fs=require\("fs"\);var zlib=require\("zlib"\);var buf=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var ZIP_LOCAL=67324752;var off=0;while\(off<buf.length\){var sig=buf.readUInt32LE\(off\);if\(sig-ZIP_LOCAL\){break}var method=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+8\);var csize=buf.readUInt32LE\(off+18\);var fnlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+26\);var exlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+28\);var name=buf.toString\("utf8",off+30,off+30+fnlen\);var doff=off+30+fnlen+exlen;if\(name.endsWith\(".xml"\)\){console.log\("FILE:",name,"method:",method,"csize:",csize\)}off=doff+csize}')

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var fs=require\("fs"\);var buf=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var off=0;var count=0;while\(off<buf.length&&count<25\){var sig=buf.readUInt32LE\(off\);if\(sig==67324752\){var csize=buf.readUInt32LE\(off+18\);var fnlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+26\);var exlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+28\);var name=buf.toString\("utf8",off+30,off+30+fnlen\);console.log\(count,name,csize\);off=off+30+fnlen+exlen+csize;count++}else{break}}')

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var fs=require\("fs"\);var buf=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var off=0;var flags=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+6\);console.log\("general purpose flags:",flags.toString\(2\)\);console.log\("bit 3 \(data descriptor\):",\(flags>>3\)&1\)')

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var fs=require\("fs"\);var buf=fs.readFileSync\("Switch.mpk"\);var off=0;for\(var i=0;i<8&&off<buf.length;i++\){if\(buf.readUInt32LE\(off\)==67324752\){var method=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+8\);var flags=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+6\);var csize=buf.readUInt32LE\(off+18\);var usize=buf.readUInt32LE\(off+22\);var fnlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+26\);var exlen=buf.readUInt16LE\(off+28\);var name=buf.toString\("utf8",off+30,off+30+fnlen\);console.log\(i,name,"method:",method,"flags:",flags.toString\(2\),"csize:",csize,"usize:",usize,"fnlen:",fnlen,"exlen:",exlen\);off=off+30+fnlen+exlen+csize}else{console.log\("not a local header at",off\);break}}')
